item.title: He done
item.description:
Christmas Commish from an awesome fan! All hail the mighty Thunder Chicken! The one I would summon when I finally had enough of Gary's shit!!
Fitting weather for a Zappy Dos but bad for glass! The breeze at least showed off its angles I guess haha Funny glassy adventure story with this that I'll post when I collect all the pics but for now, HE DONE
item.dc:creator: cellocalypse

item.title: That's my spot! - Sheldon the cat probably lol
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: It's rough today
item.description: I might delete later. I've suffered with clinical depression since 2012. I'm on antidepressants, which do help for the most part. I have good days and bad days. But some days, like today, it gets very bad. Not to mention all the stresses going on with the holidays, looking for a full time job, not having insurance ,etc. I'm not looking for sympathy. I just wanted to vent to anyone who might listen or understand. It's easier here because I don't have to protect an image of myself to anybody. Thanks Imgur. Edit: Thank you all for your kind words and support. My heart goes out to everyone who struggles with depression or any other mental illness. It's okay to fall apart sometimes, even if it hurts to put the pieces back. I love this community and all the wonderful people here. Thanks again, tomorrows a new day.
item.dc:creator: PaulDam

item.title: Changed my first flat tire today.
item.description: But I don't have anyone to really celebrate it with me. I know this is like... The easiest of things to a lot of people, but it a a big deal to me. Did something I wasn't sure how to do, and got it to the tire store without the spare falling off.
item.dc:creator: LyingForFakeInternetPoints

item.description: V for Vendetta
item.dc:creator: kickoat

item.title: Helped a friend move today and met his lovely void
item.description:
English/German as always We moved this cabinet among others and once we had set it up she came upstairs to inspect our progress. Habe heute einem Freund beim Umzug geholfen und dabei seine süße schwarze Katze getroffen Wir haben unter anderem diesen offenen Schrank umgezogen und als er stand kam sie nach oben um unseren Fortschritt zu begutachten
She quickly decided this basket was now her new favourite spot as it was elevated and perfect to judge us. Sie hat sich schnell dafür entschieden dass dieser Korb nun ihr neuer Lieblingsplatz ist da er perfekt ist um auf uns herab zu blicken.
After some purring she was in a playful mood and attacked my hand. Nach ein paar Streicheleinheiten kam sie in Spiellaune und griff meine Hand an
item.dc:creator: slevinkelevra
